content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 9, 1), (1, 2, 2), (2, 4, 2), (4, 9, 2), (6, 7, 5), (1, 4, 8), (2, 3, 10), (7, 9, 10), (0, 8, 14), (1, 5, 19), (1, 9, 20), (0, 9, 21), (3, 9, 22), (3, 4, 24), (0, 7, 29)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 1 exactly at time 19.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 19:

* Edge (6, 9, 1) has node 6 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 2, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 4, 2) has node 2 and time 2. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 9, 2) has node 4 and time 2. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 7, 5) has node 6 and time 5. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 4, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 3, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (7, 9, 10) has node 7 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 8, 14) has node 0 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 5, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 9, 20) has node 1 and time 20. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 21) has node 0 and time 21. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 9, 22) has node 3 and time 22. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 4, 24) has node 3 and time 24. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 7, 29) has node 0 and time 29. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 9, 2, 4, 7, 3, 8, 5, 1, 20, 21, 22, 24, and 7.

Answer: [9, 2, 4, 7, 3, 8, 5, 1, 20, 21, 22, 24, 7]
